name: J.P. Morgan Wealth Management and Private Bank
scope_note: Covers J.P. Morgan Wealth Management (branch-based advisors, mass affluent to HNW) and J.P. Morgan Private Bank (UHNW, $10M+ clients) only. Excludes JPMorgan Chase consumer banking, commercial banking, investment banking, and J.P. Morgan Asset Management divisions.
ai_strategy_summary: J.P. Morgan's AI strategy in wealth management and private banking centres on the Coach AI ecosystem — compressing advisor prep time, surfacing real-time client intelligence, and enabling each advisor to serve 50% more clients over time. Coach AI (Wealth Management) and Connect Coach (Private Bank) are broadly deployed across ~9,600 advisors and have driven a 20% year-over-year gross sales increase — the clearest documented AI-to-revenue link of any wealth manager tracked.

head_of_ai.name: Wealth Management Division Leadership
head_of_ai.title: No dedicated WM AI head publicly named

headline_metric: ~$6T+ client assets, 20% YoY gross sales growth — Coach AI cited as key driver at 2025 Investor Day
headline_initiative: Coach AI (Wealth Management) + Connect Coach (Private Bank) — real-time client intelligence, next-best-action, and meeting prep via NLP, broadly deployed across ~9,600 WM and PB advisors

key_metrics.client_assets_note: Year-end 2024; Q3 2025 reported $6.8T. Source: J.P. Morgan earnings.
key_metrics.advisors_note: ~9,600 total WM + PB advisors (confirmed). Sub-division breakdown not publicly disclosed.

advisor_productivity.headline: Coach AI / Connect Coach: 95% faster info retrieval, 20% YoY gross sales growth — broadly deployed across ~9,600 advisors
advisor_productivity.detail: Coach AI (Wealth Management) and Connect Coach (Private Bank) deploy NLP to surface real-time client intelligence, next-best-action recommendations, and research digests before every client interaction. Broadly deployed across approximately 9,600 WM and PB advisors. Result: advisors retrieve client information 95% faster, and the Asset & Wealth Management division reported 20% year-over-year gross sales growth — with J.P. Morgan explicitly citing AI tools as a key contributor at its 2025 Investor Day.
evidence: 95% faster client information retrieval attributed to Coach AI (J.P. Morgan investor materials)
20% YoY gross sales growth, J.P. Morgan Asset & Wealth Management — AI tools cited as key driver (2025 Investor Day)
50% more clients per advisor capacity target over 3–5 years (J.P. Morgan 2025 Investor Day)
Coach AI broadly deployed across Wealth Management advisor network
Connect Coach: Private Bank equivalent, confirmed live (2024 launch)

sources.name: J.P. Morgan 2025 Investor Day — Asset & Wealth Management (PDF)

client_personalization.headline: Connect Coach surfaces real-time personalised recommendations at point of client interaction — all PB advisors
client_personalization.detail: Connect Coach surfaces personalised investment recommendations, portfolio insights, and next-best-action prompts in real time during advisor-client interactions at J.P. Morgan Private Bank. The personalisation layer is embedded in the advisor workflow — not a separate app — and draws on live client holdings, risk profile, and relationship history. Deployed to all Private Bank advisors serving UHNW clients.
evidence: Connect Coach: real-time personalised recommendations to all Private Bank advisors
Personalisation layer integrated into coach workflow, not a standalone tool
Draws on live client holdings, risk profile, and relationship history
Coach AI equivalent capabilities rolled out across WM advisor network

sources.name: J.P. Morgan 2025 Investor Day — Asset & Wealth Management

investment_portfolio.headline: AI-informed model portfolios announced — spanning public and private markets across the WM advisor network
investment_portfolio.detail: J.P. Morgan Wealth Management offers AI-informed model portfolios spanning public equities, fixed income, and alternative/private market asset classes. Advisors use these as a starting framework, with AI surfacing allocation suggestions aligned to client risk profiles and market conditions. Investment decisions remain human-approved — AI informs the recommendation, not the final decision.
evidence: Model portfolios spanning public equities, fixed income, and alternatives referenced in WM platform materials
AI-assisted allocation described in investor presentations — specific product not separately announced
Human advisor approval required; AI role in portfolio construction not independently confirmed

research_content.headline: WM advisors use AI tools for research summarisation, market commentary, and client report generation
research_content.detail: J.P. Morgan wealth management advisors have access to AI tools (including the firm's internal LLM-based suite) for research summarisation, market commentary drafting, and client-facing report generation. These tools reduce the time advisors spend on content production, freeing capacity for client-facing work. The WM-specific rollout builds on the firm's broader internal AI tooling but is scoped to advisor workflows.
evidence: AI research summarisation tools available to WM advisors
Market commentary and client report generation via AI tooling
Integrated into Coach AI advisor workflow
Reduces advisor content production time, increasing client-facing capacity

sources.name: J.P. Morgan 2025 Investor Day — Asset & Wealth Management (PDF)
